final:
module binary_adder(
    input       [3:0]   bin_a     ,
    input       [3:0]   bin_b     ,
    
    output  reg [3:0]   sum       ,
    output  reg         carry_out
);
    
   always @(*) begin
       {carry_out, sum} = bin_a + bin_b;
   end
     
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      sum <= ~bin_a & ~bin_b; carry_out <= bin_a | bin_b;
    end
  end

endmodule
